mundo.titulo: Football regulator contacts West Ham over 'serious allegations' against Sullivan
mundo.resumen: Multiple women accuse the billionaire of abusing his power and preying on them for sex, in some cases when they were in their late teens.

mundo.titulo: Scrap legal equality duty for public services, says Badenoch
mundo.resumen: The Conservative leader says the rules have led to public bodies becoming "institutionally incompetent".

mundo.titulo: Sea drone rescues US army helicopter crew near Strait of Hormuz
mundo.resumen: An uncrewed vessel picked up two crew members of an Apache helicopter that went down on Monday, US officials tells CBS News.

mundo.titulo: World Cup tickets for Iran fans revoked, the country's football body says
mundo.resumen: Iran's football federation says its allocation of tickets for the group stage of the World Cup has been revoked just days before the tournament.

mundo.titulo: Man who murdered partner and blew up home jailed
mundo.resumen: Clifton George stabbed Annabel Rook 31 times before starting a fire at their house in north London.

mundo.titulo: 300 migrants bound for UK kidnapped and threatened with kidney removal
mundo.resumen: The Iraqi Kurds were captured by a militia who demanded a ransom of $5,000 (£3,700) per person.

negocios.titulo: AI giants' race to raise funds heats up as ChatGPT-owner plans stock market debut
negocios.resumen: The company behind ChatGPT files its plans one week after Anthropic did the same.

negocios.titulo: Driving test booking rules tightened after thousands of no shows
negocios.resumen: Learner drivers can only swap their test to the three centres nearest to their original booking.

negocios.titulo: SpaceX's stock market blast-off could be Musk's biggest gamble yet
negocios.resumen: SpaceX is preparing for a stock market debut that could transform the company, the wider market and Elon Musk's fortune.

negocios.titulo: US adds BYD to list of firms with alleged Chinese military ties
negocios.resumen: The Pentagon list warns US firms of risks linked to working with flagged Chinese companies.

negocios.titulo: How driving test booking is changing for learner drivers
negocios.resumen: From 12 May, only learner drivers can book their own tests, not instructors.

negocios.titulo: Could humanoid robots be heading for the battlefield?
negocios.resumen: Armed forces are experimenting with humanoid robots, but battlefield deployment is some way off.

tecnologia.titulo: Lovable says it has hit $500M in annualized revenue, with 1 million new projects a week
tecnologia.resumen: Lovable says it has now surpassed $500 million in annualized run-rate revenue and its users are building businesses and replacing internal software.

tecnologia.titulo: How an e-scooter founder raised $5 million to build space data centers
tecnologia.resumen: Orbital founder Euwyn Poon built 250,000 scooters at Spin. Now he wants to launch 10,000 space data centers.

tecnologia.titulo: Evotrex raises $30M to build the RV that doesn’t need a charging station
tecnologia.resumen: The startup is one of many entering the RV space, but it's banking on a hybrid power system that can go far beyond campsites.

tecnologia.titulo: Zepto’s IPO filing reveals fast growth, bigger losses, and a valuation question nobody’s answered yet
tecnologia.resumen: Zepto's advertising revenue jumped 151%, outpacing the company's 104% growth in operating revenue.

tecnologia.titulo: Why Apple’s slow-and-steady AI bet is starting to look pretty smart
tecnologia.resumen: Can Apple's new AI glow up put to bed accusations that it's losing an all-important industry race?

tecnologia.titulo: Mercor’s Brendan Foody calls out Sequoia, accusing it of ‘dual-pricing’ valuation tricks
tecnologia.resumen: Sequoia is just one of the top firms that sells same equity at two different prices.

tecnologia.titulo: Nintendo Direct June 2026: All the news and trailers
tecnologia.resumen: After a week of video game news and trailers from PlayStation, Xbox, and most of the major publishers, it’s now Nintendo’s turn. tecnologia.titulo: Apple’s best AI idea looks a lot like vibe coding
tecnologia.resumen: Most of Apple's current AI ideas are roughly the same as everyone else's AI ideas. A chatbot you can ask questions; quick ways to create or summarize text; bizarre, borderline creepy image-generation tools. The company spent most of its WWDC keynote playing catch-up with the state of the AI art, announcing Siri features you can […]

tecnologia.titulo: Apple dials down Liquid Glass, and the Mac looks way better for it
tecnologia.resumen: MacOS 27 Golden Gate will usher in a bunch of changes to the Mac when it's released later this year, with its biggest new features revolving around Siri AI. tecnologia.titulo: The Rivian R2 is too much fun to let drive itself
tecnologia.resumen: Rivian may be all in on robotaxis and autonomy, but it's still got human drivers - and EV buyers - to win over. The pricey R1S SUV and R1T pickup brought Rivian A-list media attention and cult-hit status, but the company faces a critical next step. The 2027 R2 is Rivian's bid for mainstream success, […]

tecnologia.titulo: Apple’s AI pitch will live or die by its privacy promise
tecnologia.resumen: As expected, yesterday's WWDC keynote was mostly about AI. And also as expected, Apple tried to turn its late arrival into its sales pitch: it didn't rush into AI because it was taking its time to do things right. In this case, "right" means "with more privacy than anyone else." It's a good pitch - […]

tecnologia.titulo: Marshall’s Stockwell speaker gets a replaceable battery that runs twice as long
tecnologia.resumen: Marshall has announced a new version of its stylish Stockwell Bluetooth speaker, putting a new focus on repairability.
